{{Infobox location
| name = Dragon River
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Wei children learn to swim in the [[Dragon River]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Dragon River]] is a stream that cascades down the cliffs of [[Greatfather]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Dragon River]] is a river that was drying up.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
